issues.detail: The skill does not handle all possible error scenarios, such as authentication failures or network errors.

scenarios.name: export-domain-cert-hosts
scenarios.rationale: Neither response uses the required find_hosts_by_domain_cert and export_hosts_to_json calls with the specified parameters, so both fail to meet the rubric.

scenarios.name: aggregate-apache-countries
scenarios.rationale: Response A provides most of the required code and output but omits the port 80 filter, whereas Response B gives no relevant answer.
